name: cricketstudio-okf
title: CricketStudio Open Knowledge Format
description: A curated, agent-readable Open Knowledge Format bundle of cricket concepts, metrics, methodology, sources, and examples. A trusted knowledge catalog layered over CricketStudio's canonical data spine — covering IPL, MLC, players, teams, seasons, venues, and matches.

licenses.name: CC-BY-3.0
licenses.title: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Unported (Cricsheet-derived content only)

resources.name: okf-index
resources.title: OKF Bundle Index
resources.description: Entry point for the full CricketStudio OKF knowledge bundle

resources.name: manifest
resources.title: Bundle Manifest
resources.description: Machine-readable bundle metadata, version, and file counts

resources.name: frontmatter-schema
resources.title: Frontmatter JSON Schema
resources.description: JSON Schema defining valid frontmatter fields for all OKF files
